description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and Lint that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python versions 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. Start a Typesense service and wait for it to be healthy. Then, check out the repository, install uv, set the Python version, install the project with uv, lint with Ruff, check types with mypy, and run tests with coverage excluding OpenAI.
